productDisplayName: Hush Puppies Men Casual Brown Shoes
description: Add that casual zing to your semi-formal wear with this pair of loafers from hush puppies. In a natural leather style and offering absolute comfort, this shoe makes for a great buy. Upper Leather upper for comfort and style Slip-on style for ease of wear Elasticated gores on the sides of the tongue for a customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Pull loop for easy on/off Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
